name: jerry
description: A modern, typed HTTP client for browser, Node.js, and CLI runtimes.

scripts.prepare: node ./scripts/clean.mjs dist && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ./scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.prepack: node ./scripts/clean.mjs dist && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ./scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.build: node ./scripts/clean.mjs dist && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ./scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.test: node ./scripts/clean.mjs dist/test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test --test-isolation=none dist/test/test/**/*.test.js
